name: Anthropic Auth Events
description: Anthropic compliance authentication events: SSO, Google, Apple, and generic sign-in/sign-out activity. Useful for tracking session activity and identifying unusual authentication patterns.
query: source:anthropic service:anthropic.compliance @evt.name:(user_signed_in_sso OR user_signed_in_google OR user_signed_in_apple OR user_signed_out OR user_signed_in_*)
